productDisplayName: BIBA Women Solid Navy Blue Kurta
description: Composition Blue V-neck kurta made of 100% cotton crepe, fully lined, has an embellished neckline with light gathers below, cap sleeves gathered to elastic at opening, blue colour fading to red at hem and long vents at sides Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This kurta from biba is made of soft crepe fabric which means it falls beautifully, flattering your curves while the bright embellished neckline sings out against the navy background. The highlight of this kurta is the gorgeous red colour at the hem. Wear it over leggings or over jeans depending on the occasion. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
